title: Delicate Umami French Egg Omelette
description: A fluffy and savory French egg omelette featuring confit tomato and Sichuan pepper, perfect for a post-workout meal, this dish is low in calories and rich in umami flavor.
instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together with a pinch of salt, black pepper, and Sichuan pepper until the whites and yolks are fully incorporated.
Heat the butter in a small non-stick skillet over medium heat until it starts to foam.
Pour the egg mixture into the skillet and let it cook for about 30 seconds.
Use a heat-resistant spatula to gently lift and fold the edges of the omelette towards the center, allowing the uncooked egg to flow to the edges.
Once the eggs are almost set, add the confit tomato to one half of the omelette.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley and garlic powder, if using, over the confit tomato.
Use the spatula to carefully fold the other half of the omelette over the filling.
Cook for another 30 seconds to allow the cheese to melt and the omelette to set.
Slide the omelette out of the skillet onto a plate and serve immediately.
